OBJECTION TO AND MOTION TO STRIKE PLTF'S SURREPLY FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S OBJECTONS TO PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MET ITS INITIAL BURDEN OF PRODUCTION IN MAKING A PRIMA FACIE SHOWING THAT OFFICER CANEDO'S USE OF FORCE WAS OBJECTIVELY REASONABLE (SEE CANEDO DECL. 3-10). THE BURDEN SHIFTED TO PLAINTIFF TO PRODUCE EVIDENCE SHOWING THE EXISTENCE OF A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO DO SO. PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION DOES NOT RECITE ANY FACTS AND IT IS THE ONLY DECLARATION SUPPORTING THE OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS ARE UNIDENTIFIED AND NOT AUTHENTICATED. ALL OF DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS ARE SUSTAINED IN THEIR ENTIRETY. PLAINTIFF'S BELATED REQUEST TO AMEND HIS COMPLAINT OR HIS OPPOSITION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT THERE IS A BASIS FOR THE SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ORDER RE: OBJECTIONS, AND ORDER RE: SUMMARY JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, REPORTER: TEANNA WARD, CSR #11918

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2012 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2012 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-23-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.
Appearances: Michael A. Gerchow of the Office of the City Attorney (554.3936) for defendant and moving party; Roni Rotholz (925.932.0193) for plaintiff and responding party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. Defendant met its initial burden of production in making a prima facie showing that Officer Canedo's use of force was objectively reasonable (see Canedo Decl. 3-10). The burden shifted to plaintiff to produce evidence showing the existence of a triable issue of material fact. Plaintiff failed to do so. Plaintiff's declaration does not recite any facts and it is the only declaration supporting the opposition to the motion. Plaintiff's exhibits are unidentified and not authenticated. All of Defendant's Evidentiary Objections are sustained in their entirety. Plaintiff's belated request to amend his complaint or his opposition is denied. Defendant has shown that there is a basis for the summary judgment. Order re: objections, and order re: summary judgment signed. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Continued To Dec-23-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Continued to 12/23/11 on the Court's own motion. Opposing party failed to provide courtesy copy of opposition as required by San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Courtesy copies of opposition papers must be provided no later than 12/20/11 at 4pm to Department 302. Judge: Marla Miller, Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2011 Set For Trial On Feb-06-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-20-12 At 11:30 A.M. In Dept 303
